context.goal: Export the currently selected PDF text into a plain text Notepad window.
context.cues: TIAEditor window showing a PDF page titled 'UNDERSTANDING MARKETING'; multiple text blocks are highlighted in magenta, toolbar is visible with an 'Export to text' button, and the page indicator shows 4/15.

state_anchor.locator: magenta-highlighted selected text on the PDF page

anchors.locator: toolbar button labeled 'Export to text' with document icon
OK button in the small export dialog

procedure.expect: A small export confirmation/options dialog appears over the selected PDF text.
A Notepad window opens in the upper-left containing the exported selected text as plain text.
